questionHtml: Determine the value of ΔGθ, in kJ, for the above reaction at 761 K using section 1 of the data booklet.
markschemeHtml: ΔGθ = «– RT ln K = – (0.00831 kJ K−1 mol−1 x 761 K x ln 45.6) =» – 24.2 «kJ»

meta.title: Determine the value of ΔGθ, in kJ, for the above reaction at 761 K using section 1 of the data booklet.
